college_info.college_name: KIIT School of Architecture and Planning, Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology

highlights.summary: KIIT School of Architecture and Planning, Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology is a private institute and is located in Bhubaneswar, Orissa. KIIT School of Architecture and Planning, Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels. The institute is approved by CoA and offers courses in Full Time mode. KIIT School of Architecture and Planning, Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology offers a total of 5 courses in streams such as Design and Architecture & Planning. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Arch, M.Des, M.Arch, Ph.D. and M.A. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 60. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 3,00,000 to 17,50,000. Apart from this, the KIIT School of Architecture and Planning, Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Very good college with all kinds of exposure and education.

review_content.Placements: The campus placements are very good. Many good companies come for the recruitment. Also, the alumni network is very strong. They also offer internships in the 9th semester, and the companies provide pre-placement offers. Some of the companies that come are Ultratech, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is super luxurious. The college has fully centralized air conditioning. The hostels are also very good, with A.C. and very good-sized rooms. The rooms are very spacious with individual wardrobes, mirrors, tables, drawers, cabinets, and under-bed storage space.

reviews_list.review_title: There are no placements for the architecture department.

review_content.Placements: Architecture course doesn't provide placements. It is a self-dependent course where you need to apply for jobs on your own by making portfolios. However, this field offers a huge range of courses varying from structural to behavioural sciences to universal design and many more. Roles offered in our course are architect, interior designer, structural engineer, draftsman, field engineer and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: KIIT hostels are very luxurious to stay and enjoy food, and there is a canteen on all the campuses. Wi-Fi facility, medical facilities, sports and gym are provided on all the campuses. There are landscapes and good views all around the campus, and our college has a total of 22 campuses. Shuttle service is always available.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology.

review_content.Placements: The course of B. Architecture offers a wide range of career choices. This year the first batch of KSAP passed out with great portfolios, and most of them got placed in nice companies and half of them proceeded on for higher education in separate fields of their choices.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although the building is not fully constructed and completed. Classrooms and lecture halls are suitably designed and comfortable. The hostel qualities depend on the choice of room type that you have. Since I live in an air-conditioned triple sharing room, and it's relatively nice and comfortable. The food served in the mess is not good.

reviews_list.review_title: Developing architecture college in Orissa.

review_content.Placements: As being the student of the first batch of KIIT School of Architecture & Planning, we didn't have any placements as far as I know. This year our students will go for the internship from may or June which is a part of our curriculum. So, as far as I know, next year we will be placed in respective architectural firms.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a huge infrastructure with good teaching faculty members in our department. Our department has all kinds of labs and studios as an architecture college need with every need. The quality of the food in our mess is good as well as the hostel rooms. Initially, we faced a lot of problems regarding infrastructure because of being in the first batch. It took a lot of time to built this infrastructure and give a good education, but we are kind of happy to see our college which got set up within 4 years.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and facilities are very good but personally, I would like college to make changes

review_content.Placements: For other branches like computer science, electronics and communication, ITE engineering, mechanical engineering, the placements are good. But for civil engineering, the placement is not good. An extremely poor condition of the civil engineering students. Earlier, placement was good but from 2015, placements have been very bad.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good. The classrooms are also good. Wi-Fi is working but does not give a good speed. Overall, all things like medical facilities, library, classrooms, labs- all are very good. The canteen also has a nice facility but sometimes, the food is not good in the mess. The hostel rooms are very nice.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus selection in 2015 is excellent.

review_content.Placements: There is good placement in senior batch. The percent is 60%. The highest package is 60000. The lowest package is 20000. There is national and international companies in campus selection in placement interview. The engineering part is offered for student There is placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: The wi-fi facility is available in all around the campus. Lab is full of facility, all Instruments is available there. Library have all books which student needed. Canteen food quality is also good. Hostel room is also good in condition. There is no any issues related to the college.

review_summary.college_name: Golden Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The campus is good and ecofriendly. Fully covered with different types of plants and flowers.

content.Placements: The highest Package is 20LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are VERKa and Milk Plant. 6+CGPA is required to sit for placements. Top roles offered are Agriculture Scientists, Horticulturist, Farm Manger, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are good. All the equipments are available for agricultural practices. Tools and machinery are present in the college. Facilities in the hostel are quite good and food quality is also good. We have security guards and proper CCTV cameras.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for beginners.

content.Placements: Many companies from Chandigarh visited the college and offered various jobs as per student's interest and ability. Seniors got placed in Infosys, Chandigarh with a great salary package. Girls should feel more beneficial as they are offering scholarships of 1 lacs to them.
content.Infrastructure: I have visited many colleges before my admission, and I must say that this college has the best infrastructure among all colleges in the city. The campus is spacious with all the facilities required for students. You will not feel bored on the campus as it provides a Wi-Fi facility for both teachers as well as students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.

content.Placements: In our batch, around 70-75% students got placed through campus drives. The highest package offered was around 6-7 LPA, the lowest was close to 2 LPA, and the average package stayed around 3-3.5 LPA. Companies like HCL, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Byju's, JustDial and a few good local firms visited our campus. Almost 40-50% students got internships as well, mainly in companies like HCL (training), local IT firms, and manufacturing units. The top roles offered in our course were mainly Software Trainee, Network Support, Sales Executive, Technician, and Junior Engineer, depending on the branch and skill level.

reviews.review_heading: A growing campus with good placements and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college was quite good and well-maintained. Campus had a clean and green environment with good classroom facilities, proper lighting, and ventilation. Most of the classrooms were equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi connectivity. Computer labs were updated with the required software and decent internet speed, especially for students from technical branches. Library was spacious and had a good collection of textbooks, reference materials, and journals. There was also a digital...

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ludhiana city.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very big and clean. Regularly, maid staff clean classrooms daily. Every classroom has SMART board along with a projector. Washrooms are also cleaned and well maintained regularly. Infrastructure of this college is very good. I love it.

reviews.review_heading: PCTE Group of Institutions - The best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of campus 1 and campus 2 of PCTE is very nice. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very neat and clean. College also provides Wi-Fi facilities. In campus 2, there are 7 or 8 canteens where the food is mouth-watering. I'm on campus 1, and there are also some canteens. In the hostel, food and rooms are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but I think teachers should try to speak Punjabi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. I loved the college infrastructure. Many foreign students were living there. There were special arrangements for them. They had sports events in which they participated and enjoyed a lot. They enjoyed their life in our college. I think you must have tried it. I loved the college, but the buildings were becoming old and dusty. Anyways, my college was good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure. I had a quite good experience. Life with friends is amazing here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but it is not for students. Labs, classrooms, and the library are nice. The infrastructure is good. Many facilities are available. The mess food is nice and it is available daily for even foreign students also. Many sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: PCTE Group of Institutes (A honest review).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is by far my most favourite thing here. The classes are really clean, big, and have a great environment. They have Wi-Fi as well. Labs are well-maintained. Also in hostels, they provide average food, I would rate it 6/10. Every facility like canteen and medical is there.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty with great campus life and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has modern infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs and a well-maintained library. The hostel has decent rooms with 24/7 water and electricity. The mess serves hygienic food with a decent variety. The medical facilities are accessible and sports facilities include a gym, basketball court and football ground.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning environment with strong placement and vibrant camps life.
reviews.review_text: PCTE Groups of Institute offers excellent infrastructure and facilities to support academic and personal growth. Campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Our computer labs are also well-furnished with the latest hardware and software overall it provides the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well-designed. Wi-Fi and labs in my college consist of more than 20 personal computers for students. Classrooms also have smart projectors which helps in understanding the concept easily. The food quality of hostel is superb.

reviews.review_heading: Good and affordable college in which all the things are good including infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about infrastructure of the college so it is clean and structured. We have many facilities like lifts from the ground to the top floor in every block and if I talk about the food in the mess it is delicious as well as nutritious that's all.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment because of nature. Good placements in HM, BTTM, and FD.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work on everybody's phones and laptops. Quality of food available in the mess is not so good. But the events make it fun when you have good people around, what matters is good company in college life. Library does have a good amount of books.

reviews.review_heading: All about PCTE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms have screens for teaching and AC facilities, along with good sitting areas and lawns. We have 5-6 canteens within the campus, and for medical facilities, we have a pharmacy block where we can avail medicine in case of any emergency. Sports activities are also conducted almost every day.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of the college develops but placements I think are not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as this PCTE college provides a lot of facilities. Moreover, it also organizes various types of events like Kishish which occurred in October where a lot of students gathered and various stalls have been held by various franchises.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The education provided is excellent with numerous events occurring throughout the semester, including regular classes and industrial visits. There are also opportunities for international internships lasting six months during which students can earn a substantial income. They provide proper study material and guidance by which we can learn more and more about the course.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best in our college. We have three campuses and we have access to all. Wi-Fi never works in our college at all. Wi-Fi is installed but never works. Our mobile network also goes down there because the range of the network is low but sometimes it works seamlessly.

BCA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can even go for other non-technical job profiles. These students can even go for further studies. The total seat intake for the BCA course is 200. BCA and other course students receive professionalised care under the guidance of experienced faculty members. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIELIT Imphal offers UG, diploma, certificate, and several other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Computer Application and various other streams. The formal courses provided by the college are and The non-formal long-term courses offered by the college are O Level IT, MAT O-Level, and CHM O Level. There are various other courses offered by the college. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) in Imphal charges INR 1.20 Lacs in total tuition for the three-year Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) programme. In addition, there are INR 5,000 in hostel fees and an INR 1,500 one-time caution money deposit. An additional source states that the total cost of tuition for the BCA programme at NIELIT Imphal is INR 1.2 Lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BCA at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal is accepting 160 students for its Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) programme. The course lasts for three years and is taken full-time. It is a degree course at the UG level. Amounts other than hostel fees range up to INR 1.20 L for the whole tuition. The student must have passed the 10+2 Science course with mathematics and computer Science as required subjects in order to be eligible for this course. The management does not administer any further entrance examinations for admission. Students are admitted based on merit or basic eligibility criteria as per the college norms.
faqs.question: How many students can do BCA at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal?

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal offers admission to most of the formal courses based on admission test conducted by the institute. The selection for short-term courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants applying for non-formal long-term courses need to qualify NIELIT Entrance Exam for admission.
faqs.question: Can I join National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam can apply for NIELIT Imphal BCA course. Aspirants who have completed a three-year Diploma in a branch of Engineering from Polytehnic duly approved by the All India Council for Technical Education can also apply for NIELIT Imphal BCA.

review_summary.college_name: NIELIT Imphal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Great place to become an MCA Post Graduate and get valuable skills.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placed. The highest package offered in MCA (NIELIT, Imphal) was Rs. 7,00,000 whereas the average package was Rs. 5,00,000. Some of the top recruiting companies were Infosys, Cognizant and TCS. The top roles offered in the course were Software Engineer, System Analyst, Web Developed, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are huge and spacious. The laboratories are up-to-date with modern teach, fast and powerful computers. Library has a vast collection of study material on computer Science and related fields/topics. The Wi-Fi connectivity is available throughout the campus. The quality of food served in the mess and the living condition in the hostel are great.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The Institute that gives you a boost in the IT Industry .

content.Placements: Almost every student got placed by the end of the completion of the course. Rs 7,00,000 was the highest package offered and the average was Rs. 5,00,000. Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro and TCS were among the top recruiting companies that had come to the college for campus placement. Software Engineer, Web Developer, Data Analyst are some of the job roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The computer laboratory has high-end computers capable of programming, designing and developing website, etc. The classrooms have a huge space for the students. The library also has a large collection of journals, books and other resources on Computer Applications, Programming, etc. The hostels have all the necessary facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college for enthusiastic students.

content.Placements: Almost 80% got placement depending on the type of jobs and careers. Around 70% got internship and more if more people take part. Packages is around 2 LPA average. Top recruiting companies include infosys, microsoft, wipro, etc. Top Roles can be an educator after passing out.
content.Infrastructure: The institution has well modernized infrastructure with up-to-date computer systems. Classrooms are well-equipped with proper lighting, boards, well ventilated (many with ACs). But the Wi-Fi is not open to all. It's hot well managed modern library. Standard hostel & canteens are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The place is very good like heaven. Atmosphere is very clean.

content.Placements: If you finish in 3 years computer engineering course, then you want another course B.Tech then you have entry free selection and admission to 3rd semester. The scholarships were very high, then they taught many ways for your good life. Placements were very good.
content.Infrastructure: It was nice place and very good for the infrastructure campus. Lab was also good and teaching methods were very unique and easy to know. Classrooms were perfect for students. Library was very big if you wanted to find anything in the library. Hostel fee was very low. All students were staying very healthy and very clean.

admission_overview.college_name: NIELIT Imphal Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Important Dates & Updates

paragraphs: NIELIT Imphal admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates for long-term courses. For all other programmes, the selection is based on merit or admission test.NIELIT Imphaloffers degree and diploma courses in affiliation withManipur University. Besides, the institute also offers more than 40 short-term and long-term programmes. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

The institute offers nearly 30 short-term certificate courses. The duration of these courses varies fromfour to twelve weeks. Besides, the institute also offers a certificate in digital literacy programmes. Below areNIELIT coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:NIELIT Imphal Prospectus

NIELIT Imphal fee is a sum of multiple components such as registration, tuition, examination fees, etc. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. Below is course-wise fee and seat intake forNIELIT Imphal courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NIELIT Imphal admissionfor long-term courses is usually held in January and July. Besides, admission for short-term courses are open throughout the year. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in NIELIT Imphal:
STEP 1: NIELIT Imphal Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates can also collect the form from the reception centre of the campus. Candidates need to fill out personal, academic and other details in the application form. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 300 to register for BCA, DCSE and DECE courses.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT selects candidates for admission to non-formal courses based on NIELIT Entrance Exam. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for admission. For formal courses, the selection is based on an admission test conducted by the institute. Admission to short-term courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the aspirants are informed about their selection, they need to pay theNIELIT Imphal feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: NIELIT Imphal offers a four-year BCA course extended over eight semesters. The course is designed and approved by Manipur University. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam can apply for BCA. The selection for BCA is based on admission test. The test is based on standard Mathematics, English and General Aptitude.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BCA at NIELIT Imphal?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam can apply for NIELIT Imphal BCA course. Aspirants who have completed a three-year Diploma in a branch of Engineering from Polytehnic duly approved by the All India Council for Technical Education can also apply for NIELIT Imphal BCA.

faqs.answer: NIELIT Imphal offers admission to BCA course based on an admission test conducted by the institute. The test is based on Class 12 standard including Mathematics, English and General Aptitude. The test is conducted at the Imphal Centre. Besides, aspirants also need to complete a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent exam to get admisison in BCA.

courses_data.description: NIELIT Imphal offers two-year MCA programme spread across four semesters. The institute offers MCA in affiliation with Manipur University. Students can complete the course in a maximum duration of four years from the first semester of admission to become eligible for the degree. faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BCA/ Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Engineering orequivalent degree to apply for NIELIT Imphal MCA programme. Aspirants who have passed BSc/ BCom/ BA Mathematics at Class 12 level with at least 50% aggregate can apply for NIELIT Imphal MCA programme.

faqs.question: Does NIELIT Imphal offer MCA?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Imphal offers two-year MCA programme divided into four semesters. The institute offers MCA in affiliation with Manipur University.
